ambiguities.description: What entities, relationships, and boundaries define this system?
How do users and processes interact with the system over time?
What rules, constraints, and compliance requirements apply?
What external systems, integrations, and deployment constraints exist?
What defines MVP, done, and out-of-scope for this construction?
User roles and their operational responsibilities
CRUD surfaces and which entities are managed
Approval flows and their triggers and authorities
Import and export capabilities and formats
Source-of-truth boundaries (what this tool owns vs mirrors)
Operational risk and blast radius of admin actions
MVP boundary: which surfaces and workflows are in scope

questions.question: What does success look like for this system?
Who are the primary users and what is the organization size?
What is the timeline and what constraints (budget, compliance, team) apply?
Who are the users and what are their roles?
What entities and CRUD surfaces are required?
What actions require approval and who approves?
What is the source of truth for each entity?
What is the blast radius of destructive admin actions?

assumptions.assumption: The tool is used by authenticated internal users only
Standard RBAC is sufficient for MVP

suggested_closures.decision: Internal tool construction will treat admin actions as high-risk and require explicit audit logging and approval gates for destructive operations.
suggested_closures.rationale: Internal tools often have broad permissions; audit and approval reduce operational risk.

seed_tasks.title: Define system scope and success criteria
seed_tasks.transformation: Document what the system must do, for whom, and what success looks like.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: A written scope document exists and has been reviewed.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A third party can understand the scope without asking clarifying questions.

seed_tasks.title: Identify constraints and non-goals
seed_tasks.transformation: Explicitly list budget, timeline, compliance, and out-of-scope items.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No hidden constraints remain that would invalidate the construction plan.

seed_tasks.title: Define user roles and CRUD matrix
seed_tasks.transformation: Document roles and which entities each role can create, read, update, delete.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every role has defined permissions for every entity.

seed_tasks.title: Map approval flows and authorities
seed_tasks.transformation: Document which actions need approval, who can approve, and escalation rules.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every approval-required action has a defined approver.

seed_tasks.title: Define source-of-truth boundaries
seed_tasks.transformation: Document which entities this tool owns and which are mirrored from external systems.

residuals.description: System scope and success criteria are not yet defined by the principal.
Constraints, compliance requirements, and non-goals have not been documented.
User roles and responsibilities are not defined.
Required CRUD surfaces are not documented.
